docs.title: Docs Template
docs.text: Welcome to Atelier Mana Oasis! This is the workshop where project Mana-Oasis will come to life.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Tables
docs.text:
A simple table looks like this:

First Header Second Header Third Header Content Cell Content Cell Content Cell Content Cell Content Cell Content Cell

Specify alignment for each column by adding colons to separator lines:

First Header Second Header Third Header Left Center Right Left Center Right

Note that a table must be surrounded by blank lines. There must be a blank line before and after the table.

docs.title: Links
docs.text:
This is an internal link that links to another Markdown document, the path is always relative to the docs_dir root. Here is another internal link for example.

You can also link to a section (header) within a Markdown document by using an anchor link. Section IDs are created from the text of a header. All text is converted to lowercase and any disallowed characters, including white-space, are converted to dashes.

docs.title: Flowcharts
docs.text:
graph LR
  A[Start] --> B{Failure?};
  B -->|Yes| C[Investigate...];
  C --> D[Debug];
  D --> B;
  B ---->|No| E[Success!];

docs.title: Sequence Diagrams
docs.text:
sequenceDiagram
  autonumber
  Server->>Terminal: Send request
  loop Health
      Terminal->>Terminal: Check for health
  end
  Note right of Terminal: System online
  Terminal-->>Server: Everything is OK
  Terminal->>Database: Request customer data
  Database-->>Terminal: Customer data
